read_only_paths: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

instruction_summary: Advance issue #133 by implementing bulk document metadata edit logic without adding a dedicated UI yet, relying on service/model/spec changes and documenting the initial contract.
actual_work: Inspected the current document, document version, tag, archive, and import dry-run implementations, then added a logic-only bulk metadata edit slice for issue #133: a persisted `BulkEditDryRun` model and migration, `DocumentBulkEditPlan` for dry-run planning, `DocumentBulkEditPreview` for saved preview creation, `DocumentBulkEditExecutor` for apply/confirm flow, focused factories/specs, and an app-spec update that documents the initial contract and current omission of UI wiring and data-classification-tag support.
changed_files: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

commands.notes: Confirmed local main before starting the issue #133 logic-only slice.

commands.command: docker compose run --rm app bundle exec rspec spec/models/bulk_edit_dry_run_spec.rb spec/services/document_bulk_edit_plan_spec.rb spec/services/document_bulk_edit_preview_spec.rb spec/services/document_bulk_edit_executor_spec.rb
commands.notes: RSpec boot aborted because the local database has five pending migrations, including the new bulk edit dry-run migration.

tests.command: docker compose run --rm app bundle exec rspec spec/models/bulk_edit_dry_run_spec.rb spec/services/document_bulk_edit_plan_spec.rb spec/services/document_bulk_edit_preview_spec.rb spec/services/document_bulk_edit_executor_spec.rb
tests.notes: Pending migrations prevented the focused bulk edit specs from running locally.

loaded_context: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md
usage_notes.token_notes: Exact token counts were unavailable from the environment.

risks: The initial logic-only slice intentionally excludes dedicated `data_classification_tags` handling because the current schema only has `document_tags`.
remaining_concerns: No controller or admin UI wiring was added in this turn; future work still needs to connect the preview/execution services to a selection screen.
Local RSpec validation is still pending until the test database is migrated.

signals.note: Created the repo-local prompt log during initial issue #133 scoping before implementation.
